message:
fix(server): resolve 9 clippy lints across server crate

integrity_guard.rs: backtick doc item, const fn, clone_from, &str param,
remove needless double-ref.
tui_poller.rs: allow dead_code on unused constructor, allow option_if_let_else
for recovery path with large Result type.
tui_app.rs: remove unused DbConn import.
cleanup.rs: collapse nested if, use unwrap_or_else for lazy evaluation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
